title: Same Artwork. 5 Packs. 70 Files. What a Complete Etsy Listing Looks Like.
description: One artwork. Five ratio packs: 2:3 US Portrait (4×6, 8×12, 12×18), 3:4 Gallery Standard (6×8, 9×12, 12×16), 4:5 Most Searched (8×10, 16×20, 24×30), ISO A-series for EU, UK, and Australia buyers (A4, A3, A5), and Extras (5×7, 11×14, square). One upload. 70 files. 300 DPI. SnapToSize generates every pack simultaneously.
